name: claude-code-config-dir-patcher
description: Patches Anthropic Claude Code for VS Code so claudeCode.environmentVariables CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR affects extension auth/session storage.

claudeConfigDirPatcher.autoPatch.description: Automatically patch the installed Anthropic Claude Code extension on VS Code startup.

claudeConfigDirPatcher.showStartupNotifi.description: Show a notification when startup auto-patching succeeds or is already applied.

commands.title: Claude Config Dir Patcher: Apply Patch
Claude Config Dir Patcher: Verify Patch
Claude Config Dir Patcher: Restore Backup
